sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46511" key="zw|o/trofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῳότροφ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nourishing animals.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:39:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39.4</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:41:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
